_notes.posture: Leave Claude running on your own code while AFK. Three hardening steps vs interactive: (1) allowUnsandboxedCommands=false disables the escape hatch that a March 2026 Falco demo showed Claude would request on its own; (2) failIfUnavailable=true turns missing bubblewrap/seatbelt into a hard failure instead of silent unsandboxed execution; (3) allowManagedDomainsOnly=true blocks any not-on-the-list domain request without a prompt (rather than asking, which won't get answered when you're AFK).
_notes.use_with: claude --dangerously-skip-permissions — safe because sandbox is kernel-enforced and the escape hatch is structurally unavailable.
